free_text: Structure of 9Be from proton scattering at 180 MeV
Protons detected using helical wire chamber
Beam current measured using external Faraday cup.
Spectrum fitted using ALLFIT program. Broad states
were represented by Lorentzian functions convoluted
with resolution.  Positions and widths were determined
by iterative analysis of angular distributions.
Repeated measurements with same target were averaged.
into cross sections, 0.015 into analyzing powers.
Data of S. Dixit taken from WWW site of J. J. Kelly,
